text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A large group of students is training together, but
my eyes gradually fall on the lone figure watching
them from afar.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um, we're gonna do a group training session with
everyone who's still around...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: If you're interested, would you like to join us?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nope. Find someone else for your games.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian turns down their offer so harshly, I
can't help but wonder if there's a reason she
doesn't want to run with them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day on my way home after school, I see her
running on the track.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then leave me alone. You're distracting me.
choice_data_list: You just wanted to run on your own, huh?
You just wanted to run on your own, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Then leave me alone. You're distracting me.
choice_data_list: You just wanted to run on your own, huh?
You just wanted to run on your own, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No, duh. I always make sure to keep my training
balanced.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Was that all you came here to say? Can I get
back to training already?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian dismisses me curtly and continues
running again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... So you saw, huh? Yeah, I focus better when
I'm alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian runs off without a second glance at
me.
